offer: The 30-Day Kickstart — Your First Month Fully Coached, Just $1
sender: Jessica (personal GHL number — Anytime Fitness Bloomington staff)
avatar: Lifestyle Member — 35-52 — tried gyms, quit before, accountability-driven

phases.name: Strike While Hot
phases.rules: under 160 chars preferred, no emojis, no exclamation overuse, TCPA opt-out on D0-AM only

phases.name: Long Game
phases.tone: zero pressure, honest, leaves door open
phases.rules: no urgency language, D30 is the goodbye message

messages.goal: Confirm the relationship, set expectations, get TCPA consent on record
messages.message: Hi {{first_name}} — it's Jessica at Anytime Fitness Bloomington. Your 30-day kickstart is locked in. I'm your contact this month. Reply STOP anytime.
messages.compliance_notes: TCPA opt-out 'Reply STOP anytime' is mandatory on this message only. Do not duplicate on subsequent messages.

messages.send_time: same day, 3 hours after D0-AM or 5pm if signup is after 2pm
messages.goal: Surface the orientation as the one action that matters this week
messages.message: {{first_name}}, your orientation slot, 4-week plan, and first-week guide are all waiting. Best move this week: book your orientation. I can check what's open — just say the word.
messages.compliance_notes: No TCPA required on this message — covered by D0-AM.

messages.goal: Soft nudge on orientation — offer to handle the scheduling friction
messages.message: {{first_name}}, did you get a chance to look at your 4-week plan? Let me know if you want to book your orientation — I can check availability right now.

messages.goal: Use social proof pattern (week 1 = success predictor) to motivate first visit
messages.message: {{first_name}}, the members who come in week one almost always make it to week four. Still time to make this your week one.

messages.goal: Open a real conversation about what's getting in the way — remove friction
messages.message: {{first_name}}, you're 4 days into your kickstart. Have you made it in yet? If something's in the way — schedule, nerves, not knowing where to start — just tell me. That's what this thread is for. I've heard it all.
messages.compliance_notes: No opt-out required. Phase 2 — up to 300 chars allowed.

messages.goal: Remind them this text thread is a permanent resource, not just onboarding
messages.message: {{first_name}}, quick note: this thread doesn't expire when your $1 month does. If you ever have a question — what to do, how to use the gym, what to eat — just reply. I'll answer. 💬
messages.compliance_notes: 1 emoji allowed in Phase 2. No opt-out required.

messages.goal: Surface the weekly check-in as an asset they haven't used — reduce perceived effort
messages.message: {{first_name}}, one week in. Your first 15-min check-in with me is part of what you signed up for — by text or in person. Worth doing this week. Want me to set something up?

messages.goal: Honest, low-judgment question that opens a real conversation — day 10 is the common wall
messages.message: {{first_name}}, honest question — what's the one thing getting in the way right now? Doesn't have to be big. Most people hit something around day 10. If you tell me, I can usually help.

messages.goal: Halfway check-in — no pressure, just open the conversation door
messages.message: {{first_name}}, halfway. I'm not going to push you. I just want to know honestly — how's it been? Even one word is fine.
messages.compliance_notes: Phase 3 — zero pressure language only. No urgency words.

messages.goal: Remind them they still have coaching assets available — 10 days feels manageable
messages.message: {{first_name}}, 10 days left on your kickstart. You still have 2 check-ins with me included — text or in person, your call. Anytime this week works if you want to use one.
messages.compliance_notes: Phase 3. No urgency language — 'anytime this week' is availability, not pressure.

messages.goal: Transparent heads-up on standard rate transition — removes surprise, builds trust
messages.message: {{first_name}}, 5 days left. After day 30, your membership moves to our standard rate — just heads up so you're not surprised. No action needed today.
messages.compliance_notes: Phase 3. Must be factually accurate — confirm standard rate with gym before deploying. No cancel pressure.

messages.goal: Graceful close — leave the door permanently open regardless of outcome
messages.message: {{first_name}}, your 30-day kickstart ends today. Whatever this month looked like — a lot or a little — the door here is always open. Come back whenever you're ready. — Jessica
messages.compliance_notes: Phase 3. This is the final touch — warm, no pressure, no CTA. The signature '— Jessica' is intentional: personal, not corporate.

ghl_notes.sender_number: Jessica's personal GHL number — not a shared inbox
ghl_notes.opt_out_handling: GHL handles STOP automatically — do not re-enroll after opt-out
ghl_notes.delay_type: All delays are calendar-day delays from enrollment date, not business-day
ghl_notes.time_zone: America/Indiana/Indianapolis — schedule sends in local gym timezone
